Administrative approval is being granted for the purchase of the above mentioned supplements subject to the following terms and conditions.
1) The area / demand for this AYUSH medicine should be verified. Only then should the process of procuring these items be carried out.

2) It should be ensured that the specifications of such essential drugs and pharmaceuticals and the Essential Drugs List published by the Union Ministry of AYUSH are the same. It should also be ensured that they are up-to-date and up-to-date as needed. The technical specifications of the items to be purchased should be as per the specifications agreed by the respective experts (Technical Committee / Officials). Also, it should be ensured that the technical specification is not rigorously designed to benefit any particular company. Only then should these items be purchased.
